channel.title: Open Doors Live — The Lewis Team
channel.copyright: © The Lewis Team · HomeLife Realty Coastal Properties
channel.itunes:author: The Lewis Team (Lancey & Stacy Lewis)
channel.itunes:summary: A weekly live show covering Central Florida market moves, buyer + seller strategy, new construction deals, and honest Q&A with the community. Produced by Realtor of the Year 2025 — The Lewis Team.
channel.description: A weekly live show covering Central Florida market moves, buyer + seller strategy, new construction deals, and honest Q&A with the community. Produced by Realtor of the Year 2025 — The Lewis Team.

item.title: Let's Open Doors Together — Meet The Lewis Team
item.description:
Meet The Lewis Team — Realtor of the Year 2025. We lay out our approach, our philosophy on generational wealth, and why we believe every family deserves a stress-free path to their keys.
Chapters: 0:00 Welcome + meet Lancey and Stacy 0:45 Why we do this: generational wealth 2:10 First-time buyer path 3:30 Hometown Heroes + Flex Cash explained 5:00 How to work with us
Resources: · Florida Hometown Heroes DPA — https://www.floridahousing.org/ · Our main site — https://www.lewisteamrealestate.com/ · Book a free strategy call — tel:863-288-1772

item.title: Central Florida Market Moment
item.description:
A tight market update for Polk County — what's moving, what's sitting, and where buyers are finding the best concessions right now.
Chapters: 0:00 Quick intro 0:20 What's happening in Polk County 1:00 Builder incentives stacked high right now 1:45 Where to focus your search this month
Resources: · D.R. Horton new construction — https://www.drhorton.com/ · Text us your search criteria — sms:863-288-1772
